# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service-1
  url: http://service1.example.com
  tags:
  - service-1
- name: service-2
  url: http://service2.example.com
  tags:
  - service-2
routes:
- name: route-to-service-1
  paths:
  - /service1/*
  methods:
  - GET
  - POST
  strip_path: true
  preserve_host: false
  protocols:
  - http
  - https
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  service:
    name: service-1
- name: route-to-service-2
  paths:
  - /service2/*
  methods:
  - GET
  - POST
  strip_path: true
  preserve_host: false
  protocols:
  - http
  - https
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  service:
    name: service-2
plugins:
- name: request-transformer
  config:
    add_headers:
      x-custom-header: value1
- name: response-transformer
  config:
    remove_headers:
    - x-private-header
